notes: Schedule config for auto-reanalysis. Read by watcher.cjs every minute. All times are Athens local (Europe/Athens).

watchlist.rationale: Greek industrial conglomerate — BofA target €64, Morgan Stanley €66. Energy + metals + infrastructure diversification. Direct beneficiary of elevated oil/gas and Greek economic renaissance. ATHEX index at 15-year highs.
Greece's largest bank by market cap (€11.6B). 24 of 27 analysts rate Buy/Strong Buy. Average target €4.31 vs current €2.50 — 73% upside. Greek banking sector up 34% YoY. ECB rate path key catalyst.
National Bank of Greece — Goldman target €15.10, JPM €15, BofA €13.88. Top holding in GREK ETF at 15.6%. Beneficiary of Greek economic recovery and ATHEX at decade highs.
AI chip division grew 106% to $8.4B in Q1 FY2026. AI revenue expected to exceed $100B by end of 2027. Trading 37% below Morningstar fair value of $500. VMware integration driving recurring revenue.
S&P 500 top performer — up 160%+ YTD. Global NAND flash shortage colliding with surging AI edge-storage demand. BofA target $1,080, Evercore $1,200. Trading at $914.

Signed $46B in AI cloud deals with Microsoft ($19.4B) and Meta ($27B). Nvidia invested $2B. Targeting $7-9B annualized revenue by end of 2026 — up from ~$1B. Consensus Strong Buy, target $169 vs $113.
World's largest chip foundry — monopoly on advanced nodes. 25% revenue CAGR through 2029. Every AI chip company depends on TSMC. Structural beneficiary of $1T chip capex cycle (BofA).
AI investment cycle leader. Expanded $27B Nebius AI infra deal. AI chatbot with billions of DAUs, AI glasses in high demand. Strong ad revenue base funds massive AI capex program.
Up 70%+ YTD, 12th-best in S&P 500. Personalized cancer vaccine (mRNA-4157) pivotal Phase 3 data due Sep 2026 — binary catalyst. RSV vaccine Phase 3 readout also in 2026. 10% revenue growth guided.
Fortress balance sheet energy major at all-time highs. Brent $94 with Iran war premium. Strongest FCF in sector. Defensive anchor — if Hormuz re-escalates, Brent returns toward $120.
Second-largest US defense contractor. $95.7B backlog. B-21 Raider first deliveries 2026. NATO spending at record 2.8% GDP trajectory. All NATO allies met 2% commitment for first time.
Record $251B backlog including $103B defense. 13% organic sales growth. Doubled AMRAAM missile production to 1,200/year. $3.5B Ukraine supply contract through 2031. Global defense spend $2.63T.
UK's largest defense pure-play. Up 23% YTD, 325% over 5 years. Deep order book, diversified platforms. European rearmament cycle driving record NATO budgets. Space division underappreciated.
Rolls-Royce turnaround continues — up 15% YTD, 95% in 2025. Defense + civil aerospace engines + SMR nuclear. FTSE 100 top performer over 2 years.

UK's most valuable company at £230B market cap. Leading oncology pipeline with consistent revenue growth. Defensive healthcare compounder with strong analyst upgrades. Diversified across oncology, cardiovascular, renal.
BofA top pick for $1T chip capex surge in 2026. Essential wafer fabrication equipment maker — every fab expansion requires Lam tools. AI demand driving unprecedented equipment orders.

European rearmament leader. Revenue €14.5B in 2026 (+45% YoY). Record backlog €63.8B, targeting €135B by year-end 2026. Germany ordering 687 Puma IFVs, 500+ Skyranger platforms. Divesting civilian ops to focus 100% on defense. Up 154% YoY.

AI data center fiber backbone. Up 50% YTD. $6B Meta fiber deal. Upgraded Springboard plan targets $24B annualized sales by 2028. Core operating margin expanded 390bps to 20.2%. Co-packaged optics bringing fiber directly to chip.

Up 75% YTD. 882,000 surface acres in Permian Basin. Record oil royalties 37.5 MBoe/d. Pivoting into AI data center infrastructure — invested in Bolt (ex-Google CEO Schmidt), targeting 10GW of data centers on TPL land. Unique asset-light model.

Hidden AI infrastructure play. Up 32% YTD. Energy & Transportation segment +37% demand for data center generators. $51.2B backlog through 2027. Beneficiary of $1T+ global data center buildout and onshoring trend.

Data center backup power pivot. Up 47% YTD. $400M data center backlog. C&I sales +30% expected 2026. Domestic manufacturing capacity for large generators to surpass $1B by Q4 2026. Four megatrends: lower power quality, higher prices, AI boom, infra cycle.
